title: Senior Plant Manager at Kirloskar Electric

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Kirloskar Electric
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Kirloskar Electric in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kirloskar Electric:
Kirloskar Electric is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric!
